properties.query: insert into courses ( author_id, title, description) value ( ?, ?, ? )
insert into courses ( author_id, title, description, status) value ( ?, ?, ?, ?)
update courses set title = ?, description = ? where course_id = ?

select c.course_id, c.author_id, c.title, c.description, c.status, s.section_id, s.course_id AS section_course_id, s.title AS section_title, s.section_order from courses c left join course_sections s on c.course_id = s.course_id where c.course_id = ? order by s.section_order ASC
insert into course_sections (course_id, title, section_order) values (?, ?, ?)
